data.title: Taiwan tightens semiconductor export controls on Huawei and SMIC amid US-China tech rivalry
data.description:
Taiwan has intensified its technology export controls by blacklisting two of China’s foremost semiconductor companies, Huawei Technologies and Semiconductor Manufacturing International Corp (SMIC), amid escalating tensions in the global tech sector.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/taiwan-tightens-semiconductor-export-controls-on-huawei-and-smic-amid-us-china-tech-rivalry/

data.title: Analysis: Crypto community consensus is not bearish, traders optimistically predict BTC will hit $140,000 in the near future
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Even if the market goes sideways, Bitcoin traders are not pessimistic about the price trend of Bitcoin. The current community consensus is not bearish, and believes that the bull market is far from over. Many people believe that Bitcoin is preparing for a new round of price discovery. Trader Alan Tardigrade said that Bitcoin is showing an upward expansion wedge upward trend. Since 2023, Bitcoin has risen by 49%, 125% and 68% each time the signal appears. Another trader Merlijn pointed out that the current Bitcoin trend shows a classic price bottom structure in the form of an inverted head and shoulders, and the near-term target price may reach $140,000. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin Traders Anticipate Continued Bull Market
data.description:
According to Odaily, despite the market's sideways movement, Bitcoin traders remain optimistic about the cryptocurrency's price trajectory. The prevailing sentiment within the community is not bearish, with many believing that the bull market is far from over. There is a consensus that Bitcoin is preparing for a new phase of price discovery.

Trader Alan Tardigrade has observed that Bitcoin is following an ascending broadening wedge pattern. Historically, since 2023, this signal has led to Bitcoin price increases of 49%, 125%, and 68%. Another trader, Merlijn, highlights that Bitcoin is currently exhibiting a classic price bottom structure in the form of an inverted head and shoulders pattern, with a near-term target price potentially reaching $140,000.

data.title: Michael Saylor releases Bitcoin Tracker information again, and may disclose holdings data next week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) Executive Chairman Michael Saylor once again released information related to Bitcoin Tracker on the X platform, this time writing: "The bigger the orange dot, the better." Usually, he will disclose Strategy's Bitcoin holdings data the day after releasing Bitcoin Tracker information.

data.title: 65-Year-Old Forced Out of Retirement After Losing ‘Everything’ in Elaborate Bank Fraud Scam
data.description:
An elderly man lost his entire life savings to an elaborate scam that drained his bank account, ending his retirement plans. 65-year-old Hiep Nguyen of Houston, Texas, says he received a phone call with the caller ID of the “Vietnam Embassy,” the embassy of his native country, the local news station KPRC-2 reports.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/15/65-year-old-forced-out-of-retirement-after-losing-everything-in-elaborate-bank-fraud-scam/

data.title: Bitcoin Adoption in Corporate Treasury Sparks Debate Among Industry Leaders
data.description:
According to Odaily, David Bailey, President of Bitcoin Magazine, recently shared on the X platform that companies incorporating Bitcoin into their corporate treasury are outpacing traditional firms that do not hold Bitcoin. He emphasized that corporate liquidity is increasingly tied to Bitcoin, suggesting that companies risk obsolescence if they fail to adopt this strategy.

In response, Adam Back, co-founder and CEO of Blockstream, commented that firms embracing Bitcoin treasury strategies are gaining a competitive edge over publicly listed companies. He warned that ignoring this significant opportunity for capital reallocation could leave businesses behind, stressing that it is not merely an option but a necessity in the current economic landscape.

data.title: Will Bitcoin Price Hold Above $105K or Crash Below $103K?
data.description:
Recent global developments have impacted Bitcoin price and the coin is seen fluctuating over the past few days. It was showing some positive developments earlier this week, rebounding after BlackRock’s $239 Bitcoin ETF inflow captured the market’s attention. It had also aligned with renewed ETF inflows and rising institutional accumulation
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/15/will-bitcoin-price-hold-above-105k-or-crash-below-103k/

data.title: AguilaTrades opens long BTC position and increases it to $262 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, trader AguilaTrades opened a $200 million long BTC position this morning and began to increase his position to $262 million. He opened a TWAP (time-weighted average price) order an hour and a half ago (18:00) and added 606 BTC in the next 8 hours. After 7 hours (2:00 a.m.), his BTC long position will reach 2,500 BTC, worth $262 million.
